title: Legislative Decree No. 3 of 2025 Amending the Penal Code
summary: Reported to expand theft-related offences to cover mobile phones, laptops, tablets and other devices capable of storing or processing data, including theft intended to access stored information.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.cybercrime: Amends the Penal Code for modern electronic-device theft.

notes: Related instruments: Complements Law No. 60 of 2014 on Information Technology Crimes
